name: McKee-Pownall Equine Services
message: McKee-Pownall Equine Services specializes in equine veterinary care, focusing on lameness, sport horse medicine, pre-purchase exams, dentistry, and overall wellness. They provide both in-clinic and on-farm diagnostic services utilizing advanced technology. The company operates multiple locations, including Campbellville, Caledon, and Uxbridge, and employs a team of 17 veterinarians and over 35 support staff. Their Equine Performance Centre is dedicated to assessing and treating performance issues in horses, addressing root causes beyond just lameness.
